mapper.select: SELECT approver_user_id FROM attendance_user_approvers WHERE applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} ORDER BY approver_user_id ASC

SELECT u.user_id FROM users u WHERE u.user_id IN #{userId} AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM attendance_user_approvers ua WHERE ua.applicant_user_id = u.user_id) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM attendance_department_approvers da WHERE da.department_name = u.department))

SELECT u.user_id FROM users u WHERE u.user_id IN #{userId} AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM attendance_user_approvers ua WHERE ua.applicant_user_id = u.user_id AND ua.approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM attendance_department_approvers da WHERE da.department_name = u.department AND da.approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}))

SELECT ua.applicant_user_id, applicant.full_name AS applicant_name, applicant.department AS applicant_department, ua.approver_user_id, approver.full_name AS approver_name FROM attendance_user_approvers ua LEFT JOIN users applicant ON applicant.user_id = ua.applicant_user_id LEFT JOIN users approver ON approver.user_id = ua.approver_user_id ORDER BY ua.applicant_user_id ASC, ua.approver_user_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT da.department_name, da.approver_user_id, approver.full_name AS approver_name FROM attendance_department_approvers da LEFT JOIN users approver ON approver.user_id = da.approver_user_id ORDER BY da.department_name ASC, da.approver_user_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_user_approvers (applicant_user_id, approver_user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicantUserId}, #{approverUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT approver_user_id FROM attendance_department_approvers WHERE department_name = #{departmentName} ORDER BY approver_user_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_department_approvers SET department_name = #{newDepartmentName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE department_name = #{oldDepartmentName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_department_approvers (department_name, approver_user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{departmentName}, #{approverUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
